decisions.rationale: Avoid NVS wear while enabling remember me across reboots
Secure AP Fallback without opening access point automatically to unauthorized users
Prevent self-lockout from human error by requiring explicit confirmation

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 1 to begin work on the first phase of the v1.7 milestone
context_notes: We just finished planning milestone v1.7. All research is synthesized into requirements and the roadmap is fully locked. We are ready to start planning the implementation details for Phase 1.
